category_sources: Official GitHub README describes tweakcc as a CLI tool that upgrades and customizes the Claude Code experience.
source_facts.description says it customizes Claude Code themes, thinking verbs, and more.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading uses tweakcc.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README documents installation, usage, patches, themes, system prompts, and API notes.
repo_sources: source_facts.homepage points to the official GitHub repository.
tags_sources: Official README describes system prompt customization, themes, toolsets, and native/npm installs.
source_facts.description names Claude Code themes and customization.
